multi_dialect_metric_mappings.description: Cross-engine SQL implementations for unified financial services metrics

metrics.description: Net interest income as a percentage of average earning assets
metrics.neutral_formula: DIVIDE(SUMX(interest_income_table, interest_income) - SUMX(interest_expense_table, interest_expense), AVERAGEX(assets_table, average_assets))

sqlserver.view_definition: CREATE VIEW net_interest_margin AS SELECT (SUM(ii.amount) - SUM(ie.amount)) / NULLIF(AVG(a.average_balance), 0) AS value FROM interest_income ii JOIN interest_expense ie ON ii.entity_id = ie.entity_id AND ii.as_of_date = ie.as_of_date JOIN assets a ON ii.entity_id = a.entity_id AND ii.as_of_date = a.as_of_date GROUP BY ii.entity_id, ii.as_of_date;
sqlserver.preaggregation: CREATE CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX cci_nim ON net_interest_margin;

oracle.view_definition: CREATE VIEW net_interest_margin AS SELECT (SUM(ii.amount) - SUM(ie.amount)) / NULLIF(AVG(a.average_balance), 0) AS value FROM interest_income ii JOIN interest_expense ie ON ii.entity_id = ie.entity_id AND ii.as_of_date = ie.as_of_date JOIN assets a ON ii.entity_id = a.entity_id AND ii.as_of_date = a.as_of_date GROUP BY ii.entity_id, ii.as_of_date;
oracle.preaggregation: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW LOG ON interest_income WITH ROWID; CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_nim REFRESH FAST AS SELECT * FROM net_interest_margin;
oracle.performance_notes: Use materialized view logs for incremental refresh

postgres.view_definition: CREATE VIEW net_interest_margin AS SELECT (SUM(ii.amount) - SUM(ie.amount)) / NULLIF(AVG(a.average_balance)::DECIMAL, 0) AS value FROM interest_income ii JOIN interest_expense ie ON ii.entity_id = ie.entity_id AND ii.as_of_date = ie.as_of_date JOIN assets a ON ii.entity_id = a.entity_id AND ii.as_of_date = a.as_of_date GROUP BY ii.entity_id, ii.as_of_date;
postgres.preaggregation: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_nim AS SELECT * FROM net_interest_margin; CREATE INDEX idx_nim_entity_date ON mv_nim(entity_id, as_of_date);

snowflake.view_definition: CREATE VIEW net_interest_margin AS SELECT (SUM(ii.amount) - SUM(ie.amount)) / NULLIF(AVG(a.average_balance), 0) AS value FROM interest_income ii JOIN interest_expense ie ON ii.entity_id = ie.entity_id AND ii.as_of_date = ie.as_of_date JOIN assets a ON ii.entity_id = a.entity_id AND ii.as_of_date = a.as_of_date GROUP BY ii.entity_id, ii.as_of_date;
snowflake.preaggregation: ALTER TABLE net_interest_margin CLUSTER BY (entity_id, as_of_date);

iceberg.view_definition: CREATE TABLE net_interest_margin USING iceberg PARTITIONED BY (year(as_of_date)) AS SELECT entity_id, as_of_date, (SUM(ii.amount) - SUM(ie.amount)) / NULLIF(AVG(a.average_balance), 0) AS value FROM interest_income ii JOIN interest_expense ie ON ii.entity_id = ie.entity_id AND ii.as_of_date = ie.as_of_date JOIN assets a ON ii.entity_id = a.entity_id AND ii.as_of_date = a.as_of_date GROUP BY ii.entity_id, ii.as_of_date;
iceberg.preaggregation: ALTER TABLE net_interest_margin ADD PARTITION FIELD year(as_of_date);
iceberg.performance_notes: Partition by year for time-series optimization

sqlserver.view_definition: CREATE VIEW sharpe_ratio AS SELECT (AVG(pr.daily_return) - rfr.risk_free_rate) / NULLIF(STDEV(pr.daily_return), 0) AS value FROM portfolio_returns pr CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 1 risk_free_rate FROM risk_free_rates ORDER BY as_of_date DESC) rfr GROUP BY pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date;
sqlserver.preaggregation: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX idx_sharpe ON sharpe_ratio(entity_id, as_of_date) INCLUDE (value);
sqlserver.performance_notes: Include computed columns in covering indexes

oracle.view_definition: CREATE VIEW sharpe_ratio AS SELECT (AVG(pr.daily_return) - rfr.risk_free_rate) / NULLIF(STDDEV(pr.daily_return), 0) AS value FROM portfolio_returns pr CROSS JOIN (SELECT risk_free_rate FROM risk_free_rates WHERE rownum = 1 ORDER BY as_of_date DESC) rfr GROUP BY pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date;
oracle.preaggregation: CREATE BITMAP INDEX idx_sharpe_entity ON sharpe_ratio(entity_id); CREATE BITMAP INDEX idx_sharpe_date ON sharpe_ratio(as_of_date);

postgres.view_definition: CREATE VIEW sharpe_ratio AS SELECT (AVG(pr.daily_return) - rfr.risk_free_rate) / NULLIF(STDDEV(pr.daily_return), 0) AS value FROM portfolio_returns pr CROSS JOIN (SELECT risk_free_rate FROM risk_free_rates ORDER BY as_of_date DESC LIMIT 1) rfr GROUP BY pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date;
postgres.preaggregation: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_sharpe AS SELECT * FROM sharpe_ratio; CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_sharpe_gist ON mv_sharpe USING GIST (entity_id, as_of_date);

snowflake.view_definition: CREATE VIEW sharpe_ratio AS SELECT (AVG(pr.daily_return) - rfr.risk_free_rate) / NULLIF(STDDEV(pr.daily_return), 0) AS value FROM portfolio_returns pr CROSS JOIN (SELECT risk_free_rate FROM risk_free_rates ORDER BY as_of_date DESC LIMIT 1) rfr GROUP BY pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date;
snowflake.preaggregation: ALTER TABLE sharpe_ratio SET CLUSTERING KEY = (entity_id, as_of_date);

iceberg.view_definition: CREATE TABLE sharpe_ratio USING iceberg PARTITIONED BY (entity_id) AS SELECT pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date, (AVG(pr.daily_return) - rfr.risk_free_rate) / NULLIF(STDDEV(pr.daily_return), 0) AS value FROM portfolio_returns pr CROSS JOIN (SELECT risk_free_rate FROM risk_free_rates ORDER BY as_of_date DESC LIMIT 1) rfr GROUP BY pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date;
iceberg.preaggregation: ALTER TABLE sharpe_ratio ADD PARTITION FIELD entity_id;
iceberg.performance_notes: Partition by entity for tenant isolation

metrics.description: Maximum expected loss over a specific time period at a given confidence level

sqlserver.view_definition: CREATE VIEW value_at_risk AS SELECT STDEV(pr.daily_return) * SQRT(hp.holding_days) * cf.confidence_multiplier AS value FROM portfolio_returns pr CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 1 holding_days FROM holding_periods) hp CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 1 confidence_multiplier FROM confidence_factors) cf GROUP BY pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date;
sqlserver.preaggregation: CREATE CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX cci_var ON value_at_risk WITH (COMPRESSION_DELAY = 0);
sqlserver.performance_notes: Columnstore with immediate compression for risk metrics

oracle.view_definition: CREATE VIEW value_at_risk AS SELECT STDDEV(pr.daily_return) * SQRT(hp.holding_days) * cf.confidence_multiplier AS value FROM portfolio_returns pr CROSS JOIN (SELECT holding_days FROM holding_periods WHERE rownum = 1) hp CROSS JOIN (SELECT confidence_multiplier FROM confidence_factors WHERE rownum = 1) cf GROUP BY pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date;
oracle.preaggregation: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_var REFRESH COMPLETE START WITH SYSDATE NEXT SYSDATE + 1/24 AS SELECT * FROM value_at_risk;
oracle.performance_notes: Scheduled refresh for daily risk calculations

postgres.view_definition: CREATE VIEW value_at_risk AS SELECT STDDEV(pr.daily_return) * SQRT(hp.holding_days::DOUBLE PRECISION) * cf.confidence_multiplier AS value FROM portfolio_returns pr CROSS JOIN (SELECT holding_days FROM holding_periods LIMIT 1) hp CROSS JOIN (SELECT confidence_multiplier FROM confidence_factors LIMIT 1) cf GROUP BY pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date;
postgres.preaggregation: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_var AS SELECT * FROM value_at_risk WITH DATA; REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY mv_var;
postgres.performance_notes: Concurrent refresh to avoid blocking queries

snowflake.view_definition: CREATE VIEW value_at_risk AS SELECT STDDEV(pr.daily_return) * SQRT(hp.holding_days) * cf.confidence_multiplier AS value FROM portfolio_returns pr CROSS JOIN (SELECT holding_days FROM holding_periods LIMIT 1) hp CROSS JOIN (SELECT confidence_multiplier FROM confidence_factors LIMIT 1) cf GROUP BY pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date;
snowflake.preaggregation: CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE dt_var TARGET_LAG = '1 hour' AS SELECT * FROM value_at_risk;
snowflake.performance_notes: Dynamic tables for automatic refresh based on lag targets

iceberg.view_definition: CREATE TABLE value_at_risk USING iceberg TBLPROPERTIES ('write.update.mode'='merge-on-read') AS SELECT pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date, STDDEV(pr.daily_return) * SQRT(hp.holding_days) * cf.confidence_multiplier AS value FROM portfolio_returns pr CROSS JOIN (SELECT holding_days FROM holding_periods LIMIT 1) hp CROSS JOIN (SELECT confidence_multiplier FROM confidence_factors LIMIT 1) cf GROUP BY pr.entity_id, pr.as_of_date;

metrics.description: Portfolio beta relative to market benchmark
metrics.neutral_formula: DIVIDE(SUMX(correlation_table, (portfolio_return - portfolio_mean) * (market_return - market_mean)), SUMX(correlation_table, POWER(market_return - market_mean, 2)))

sqlserver.view_definition: CREATE VIEW beta_coefficient AS SELECT SUM((pmr.portfolio_return - pm.avg_portfolio) * (pmr.market_return - mm.avg_market)) / NULLIF(SUM(POWER(pmr.market_return - mm.avg_market, 2)), 0) AS value FROM portfolio_market_returns pmr CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(portfolio_return) as avg_portfolio FROM portfolio_market_returns) pm CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(market_return) as avg_market FROM portfolio_market_returns) mm GROUP BY pmr.entity_id, pmr.as_of_date;
sqlserver.preaggregation: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX idx_beta_covering ON beta_coefficient(entity_id, as_of_date, value);

oracle.view_definition: CREATE VIEW beta_coefficient AS SELECT SUM((pmr.portfolio_return - pm.avg_portfolio) * (pmr.market_return - mm.avg_market)) / NULLIF(SUM(POWER(pmr.market_return - mm.avg_market, 2)), 0) AS value FROM portfolio_market_returns pmr CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(portfolio_return) avg_portfolio FROM portfolio_market_returns) pm CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(market_return) avg_market FROM portfolio_market_returns) mm GROUP BY pmr.entity_id, pmr.as_of_date;
oracle.preaggregation: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_beta ENABLE QUERY REWRITE AS SELECT * FROM beta_coefficient;
oracle.performance_notes: Query rewrite for complex statistical calculations

postgres.view_definition: CREATE VIEW beta_coefficient AS SELECT SUM((pmr.portfolio_return - pm.avg_portfolio) * (pmr.market_return - mm.avg_market)) / NULLIF(SUM(POWER(pmr.market_return - mm.avg_market, 2)), 0) AS value FROM portfolio_market_returns pmr CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(portfolio_return)::DECIMAL as avg_portfolio FROM portfolio_market_returns) pm CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(market_return)::DECIMAL as avg_market FROM portfolio_market_returns) mm GROUP BY pmr.entity_id, pmr.as_of_date;
postgres.preaggregation: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_beta AS SELECT * FROM beta_coefficient; CREATE INDEX idx_beta_partial ON mv_beta(entity_id, as_of_date) WHERE value IS NOT NULL;

snowflake.view_definition: CREATE VIEW beta_coefficient AS SELECT SUM((pmr.portfolio_return - pm.avg_portfolio) * (pmr.market_return - mm.avg_market)) / NULLIF(SUM(POWER(pmr.market_return - mm.avg_market, 2)), 0) AS value FROM portfolio_market_returns pmr CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(portfolio_return) as avg_portfolio FROM portfolio_market_returns) pm CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(market_return) as avg_market FROM portfolio_market_returns) mm GROUP BY pmr.entity_id, pmr.as_of_date;
snowflake.preaggregation: ALTER TABLE beta_coefficient ADD SEARCH OPTIMIZATION;
snowflake.performance_notes: Search optimization for complex analytical queries

iceberg.view_definition: CREATE TABLE beta_coefficient USING iceberg PARTITIONED BY (entity_id, year(as_of_date)) AS SELECT pmr.entity_id, pmr.as_of_date, SUM((pmr.portfolio_return - pm.avg_portfolio) * (pmr.market_return - mm.avg_market)) / NULLIF(SUM(POWER(pmr.market_return - mm.avg_market, 2)), 0) AS value FROM portfolio_market_returns pmr CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(portfolio_return) as avg_portfolio FROM portfolio_market_returns) pm CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(market_return) as avg_market FROM portfolio_market_returns) mm GROUP BY pmr.entity_id, pmr.as_of_date;
iceberg.preaggregation: ALTER TABLE beta_coefficient ADD PARTITION FIELD year(as_of_date);

metrics.description: Interest income using the effective interest rate method

sqlserver.view_definition: CREATE VIEW effective_interest_income AS SELECT oca.opening_carrying_amount * eir.effective_interest_rate AS value FROM opening_carrying_amounts oca JOIN effective_interest_rates eir ON oca.entity_id = eir.entity_id AND oca.as_of_date = eir.as_of_date;
sqlserver.preaggregation: CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX idx_eii ON effective_interest_income(entity_id, as_of_date);
sqlserver.performance_notes: Clustered index on primary key columns

oracle.view_definition: CREATE VIEW effective_interest_income AS SELECT oca.opening_carrying_amount * eir.effective_interest_rate AS value FROM opening_carrying_amounts oca JOIN effective_interest_rates eir ON oca.entity_id = eir.entity_id AND oca.as_of_date = eir.as_of_date;
oracle.preaggregation: CREATE INDEX idx_eii_entity ON effective_interest_income(entity_id) COMPRESS; CREATE INDEX idx_eii_date ON effective_interest_income(as_of_date) COMPRESS;

postgres.view_definition: CREATE VIEW effective_interest_income AS SELECT (oca.opening_carrying_amount * eir.effective_interest_rate)::DECIMAL(20,4) AS value FROM opening_carrying_amounts oca JOIN effective_interest_rates eir ON oca.entity_id = eir.entity_id AND oca.as_of_date = eir.as_of_date;
postgres.preaggregation: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_eii AS SELECT * FROM effective_interest_income; CREATE INDEX idx_eii_brin ON mv_eii USING BRIN (as_of_date);

snowflake.view_definition: CREATE VIEW effective_interest_income AS SELECT oca.opening_carrying_amount * eir.effective_interest_rate AS value FROM opening_carrying_amounts oca JOIN effective_interest_rates eir ON oca.entity_id = eir.entity_id AND oca.as_of_date = eir.as_of_date;
snowflake.preaggregation: ALTER TABLE effective_interest_income CLUSTER BY (entity_id, as_of_date);

iceberg.view_definition: CREATE TABLE effective_interest_income USING iceberg PARTITIONED BY (entity_id) AS SELECT oca.entity_id, oca.as_of_date, oca.opening_carrying_amount * eir.effective_interest_rate AS value FROM opening_carrying_amounts oca JOIN effective_interest_rates eir ON oca.entity_id = eir.entity_id AND oca.as_of_date = eir.as_of_date;
iceberg.preaggregation: ALTER TABLE effective_interest_income ADD PARTITION FIELD entity_id;
iceberg.performance_notes: Partition by entity for tenant-based access patterns

metrics.description: Convert transaction amount from source to reporting currency using spot FX rate

sqlserver.view_definition: CREATE VIEW spot_conversion AS SELECT asc.amount_source_currency * sfr.spot_fx_rate AS value FROM amount_source_currency asc JOIN spot_fx_rate sfr ON asc.entity_id = sfr.entity_id AND asc.as_of_date = sfr.as_of_date;
sqlserver.preaggregation: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX idx_spot ON spot_conversion(entity_id, as_of_date, value);
sqlserver.performance_notes: Covering index for FX conversion queries

oracle.view_definition: CREATE VIEW spot_conversion AS SELECT asc.amount_source_currency * sfr.spot_fx_rate AS value FROM amount_source_currency asc JOIN spot_fx_rate sfr ON asc.entity_id = sfr.entity_id AND asc.as_of_date = sfr.as_of_date;
oracle.preaggregation: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_spot REFRESH FAST AS SELECT * FROM spot_conversion;
oracle.performance_notes: Fast refresh for real-time FX data

postgres.view_definition: CREATE VIEW spot_conversion AS SELECT (asc.amount_source_currency * sfr.spot_fx_rate)::DECIMAL(20,4) AS value FROM amount_source_currency asc JOIN spot_fx_rate sfr ON asc.entity_id = sfr.entity_id AND asc.as_of_date = sfr.as_of_date;
postgres.preaggregation: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_spot AS SELECT * FROM spot_conversion WITH DATA; CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_spot_unique ON mv_spot(entity_id, as_of_date);

snowflake.view_definition: CREATE VIEW spot_conversion AS SELECT asc.amount_source_currency * sfr.spot_fx_rate AS value FROM amount_source_currency asc JOIN spot_fx_rate sfr ON asc.entity_id = sfr.entity_id AND asc.as_of_date = sfr.as_of_date;
snowflake.preaggregation: CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE dt_spot TARGET_LAG = '15 minutes' AS SELECT * FROM spot_conversion;
snowflake.performance_notes: Low latency for FX trading applications

iceberg.view_definition: CREATE TABLE spot_conversion USING iceberg TBLPROPERTIES ('write.update.mode'='copy-on-write') AS SELECT asc.entity_id, asc.as_of_date, asc.amount_source_currency * sfr.spot_fx_rate AS value FROM amount_source_currency asc JOIN spot_fx_rate sfr ON asc.entity_id = sfr.entity_id AND asc.as_of_date = sfr.as_of_date;

phases.name: Foundation Setup
tasks: Create semantic layer schema in each target engine

phases.name: Advanced Features
tasks: Deploy draft metrics with appropriate warnings
Implement calculation groups and composite models

validation_approach.cross_engine_consistency: Run identical test queries across all engines and compare results within tolerance
validation_approach.performance_benchmarks: Measure query execution time and resource usage per engine
validation_approach.data_quality_checks: Implement automated tests for null handling, division by zero, and edge cases
